case_title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC VS. MUCAHIT YILMAZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILTY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YILMAZ, MUCAHIT AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 217 VIDAL DRIVE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132, LEASE FORFEITED, ***APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT YILMAZ, MUCAHIT AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILTY COMPANY SERVED APR-19-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YILMAZ, MUCAHIT AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILTY COMPANY SERVED APR-18-2017, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILTY COMPANY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILTY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT YILMAZ, MUCAHIT AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT YILMAZ, MUCAHIT AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILTY COMPANY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILTY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT YILMAZ, MUCAHIT AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
